name: Seed Cannon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>種</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>子</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>丸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each time a Plant-Type monster(s) is Summoned, place 1 Plant Counter on this card (max. 5). You can send this card to the Graveyard to inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each Plant Counter on it.
eff: Each time a Plant-Type monster(s) is Summoned, place 1 Plant Counter on this card (max. 5). You can send this card to the Graveyard to inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each Plant Counter on it.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
